headline: AJG Strengthens Specialty Insurance via Acquisition of Twin Elms
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher expands environmental insurance capabilities with Twin Elms acquisition, strengthening its specialty brokerage platform.

raw.headline: AJG Strengthens Specialty Insurance via Acquisition of Twin Elms
raw.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher expands environmental insurance capabilities with Twin Elms acquisition, strengthening its specialty brokerage platform.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Aon, Raises Price Target to $420
summary: Citigroup  analyst Matthew Heimermann   maintains Aon (NYSE:AON) with a Buy and raises the price target from $412 to $420.

raw.headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Aon, Raises Price Target to $420
raw.summary: Citigroup  analyst Matthew Heimermann   maintains Aon (NYSE:AON) with a Buy and raises the price target from $412 to $420.
